nasb.text: When Moses saw it, he marveled at the sight; and as he approached to look more closely, there came the voice of the Lord:

esv.text: When Moses saw it, he was amazed at the sight, and as he drew near to look, there came the voice of the Lord:

cnv.text: 他見了這個異象，十分驚奇；他正上前察看的時候，就有主的聲音說：

ccb.text: 摩西见状很惊奇，正要上前看个究竟，就听见主说，

csbs.text: 摩西见了这景象，感到惊奇。正当他上前要观看的时候，有主的声音说：
